title: lepidium chalepense var. glabratum
intro: Lepidium chalepense var. glabratum, also known as prickly peppercress or glabrous cress, is a variety of the Lepidium chalepense plant, a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lepidium chalepense var. glabratum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Lepidium chalepense var. glabratum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
